default.title: Extreme Decks
default.description: Full custom deck builds from the ground up. Pressure-treated, composite, or cedar. Engineered with the same precision we used to build APIs.

default.title: Pergola Exploits
default.description: Shade structures that hack the sun. Custom pergolas and covered deck additions. We found a vulnerability in your backyard's lack of shade.

default.title: Railing Overflows
default.description: Custom railings that won't buffer overflow. Cable, glass, wood, or metal — we build rails that are actually to code.

default.title: Deck Resurrections
default.description: Your old deck is running legacy lumber. We'll refactor it from scratch or perform surgical repairs. We do not believe in rot debt.

default.title: Stair Injections
default.description: Stairs, landings, and multi-level transitions. We handle the elevation changes your yard is throwing at us. Edge cases handled.

default.title: Lighting Payloads
default.description: Integrated deck lighting that deploys at sunset. Low-voltage LED systems wired cleaner than our old React components.
